evidence_summary: Minerva Neurosciences acquired Mind-NRG Sarl (formerly Mind-NRG SA) on February 11, 2014. According to multiple SEC filings, including the 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023, and the 10-Q filed in August 2024, Mind-NRG Sarl is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Minerva Neurosciences. The acquisition provided Minerva with the exclusive rights to develop and commercialize the compound MIN-301.
